name: Technical Blog Writer
description: Write in-depth technical blog posts with code examples

agents.name: Tech Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the technical topic and best practices
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the technical topic. Find official documentation, best practices, common pitfalls, and real-world examples. Identify the latest version and any recent changes.

agents.name: Tech Writer
agents.purpose: Write a detailed technical blog post
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a technical blog post with: clear title, TL;DR section, prerequisites, step-by-step explanation with code snippets, diagrams (described in text), common errors and solutions, conclusion with next steps. Use proper code formatting and syntax highlighting hints.

author: agentfactory
